ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., single elimination, round-robin) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the tournament (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Prize pool for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's social media */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_manager_id") REFERENCES team_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the team manager */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the team manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is part of */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., Support, Carry) */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team (if applicable) */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's social media */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES player_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_rank FOREIGN KEY ("rank") REFERENCES player_ranks ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's tournament stats */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "seat" INTEGER /* Seat position of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the player */,
  "victory_points" REAL /* Victory points earned by the player */,
  "game_wins" INTEGER /* Number of game wins by the player */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "KDA_ratio" REAL /* Killing-Destroying-Assisting ratio of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_stats_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the player role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the player role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the player rank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the player rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's performance */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the team */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Final rank of the team in the tournament */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Prize money earned by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performances_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team composition */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's role */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team for the tournament */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team for the tournament (if applicable) */,
  "substitution_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substitute player (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES player_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_compositions_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sponsor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the sponsorship contract */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's match stats */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "KDA_ratio" REAL /* Killing-Destroying-Assisting ratio of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "winner_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., best-of-1, best-of-3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
